info.title: MemoryDataPlaneServer
info.description:
API for managing Redis Agent Memory (RAM) data plane operations.

Authentication:
- Cloud deployments require `Authorization: Bearer <store-api-key>`, where the store API key is obtained from [Redis Cloud Agent Memory](https://cloud.redis.io/#/agent-memory).
- On-prem deployments run with authentication disabled.

get.description: Return information about the operational status of the service.

delete.description: Deletes long-term memories in bulk by their IDs.

post.description: Runs a semantic search on long-term memory with filtering options.

get.description: Returns a long-term memory by its ID.

patch.description: Partially updates a long-term memory by its ID.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of session IDs for a store.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sessions to return. Defaults to 100. Allowed range: 1-1000.

schema.description: Maximum number of sessions to return. Defaults to 100. Allowed range: 1-1000.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Opaque token from a previous response for the next page.

schema.description: Opaque token from a previous response for the next page.

parameters.name: filterOwnerId
parameters.description: Filter sessions by owner. Matching is case-sensitive. Mutually exclusive with includeAll.

schema.description: Filter sessions by owner. Matching is case-sensitive. Mutually exclusive with includeAll.

parameters.name: includeAll
parameters.description: Set to true to list all sessions. Required when no filter is given; mutually exclusive with filters.

schema.description: Set to true to list all sessions. Required when no filter is given; mutually exclusive with filters.

post.description: Appends a single event to a session. Creates the session if it does not exist. If sessionId is omitted, the server generates one.

delete.description: Deletes the session memory for a session.

get.description: Returns the session memory for a session.

parameters.name: includeSummarisedEvents
parameters.description: When true, the response includes events that have already been covered by the session summary and have not yet been cleaned up. This flag is not expected to be set under normal usage.

schema.description: When true, the response includes events that have already been covered by the session summary and have not yet been cleaned up. This flag is not expected to be set under normal usage.

delete.description: Deletes a single event from a session by event ID.

get.description: Returns a single event from a session by event ID.

sessionId.description: Optional session ID. If omitted, the server generates a unique ID.

actorId.description: Unique actor identifier (1-255 chars). Can represent a user, agent, or any participant.

content.description: The message content as an array of typed content parts.

createdAt.description: Client-supplied timestamp for when the event happened (UTC).

metadata.description: Optional metadata as any valid JSON value.

AddSessionEventResponseContent.description: Response returned after appending a session event.

AuthenticationErrorResponseContent.description: Authentication credentials are missing, malformed, or invalid.

BulkCreateLongTermMemoriesRequestContent.description: Bulk create request for long-term memory records.

memories.description: List of memory records to create.

BulkCreateLongTermMemoriesResponseConten.description: Bulk create result for long-term memory records.

items.description: Memory record identifier (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes). Client-provided for idempotent long-term memory creation.

created.description: IDs of successfully created memory records. Always returned; empty when no records were created.

errors.description: Errors for memory records that failed to be created.

BulkDeleteLongTermMemoriesRequestContent.description: Bulk delete request for long-term memory records.

items.description: Memory record identifier (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes). Client-provided for idempotent long-term memory creation.

memoryIds.description: List of memory record IDs to delete (1-100 IDs).

BulkDeleteLongTermMemoriesResponseConten.description: Bulk delete result for long-term memory records.

items.description: Memory record identifier (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes). Client-provided for idempotent long-term memory creation.

deleted.description: IDs of successfully deleted memory records. Always returned; empty when no records were deleted.

errors.description: Errors for memory records that failed to be deleted.

BulkOperationError.description: Error detail for a single item in a bulk operation.

id.description: Memory record ID of the item that failed.

Content.description: A single content item in a message. Exactly one member is set.

id.description: Client-provided memory record ID for idempotent creation.

sessionId.description: Session ID associated with this memory (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes).

ownerId.description: Owner ID associated with this memory (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes).

namespace.description: Namespace for logical grouping (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes).

topics.description: Topic tags for categorization (max 50 topics, each 1-100 chars).

gte.description: At or after the given timestamp.

lte.description: At or before the given timestamp.

ownerId.description: The owner of the session, set from the actorId of the first event.

events.description: Conversation events retained for this session. When summarization is enabled, events already covered by the summary are excluded unless `includeSummarisedEvents` is set; the compacted summary is returned separately in `summary`.

items.description: Session identifier (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes). When the server generates one, it uses a 32-character UUID without dashes.

SearchLongTermMemoryRequestContent.description: Semantic search request for long-term memory records.

text.description: Text to use for semantic search.

similarityThreshold.description: The minimum similarity threshold for vector search results (normalized cosine similarity). Allowed range: 0-1.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 10. Allowed range: 1-100.

pageToken.description: Opaque token from a previous response for the next page.

SearchLongTermMemoryResponseContent.description: Semantic search result for long-term memory records.

items.description: List of matching memory records. Always returned; empty when no records match.

nextPageToken.description: Opaque token for fetching the next page. Omitted when no more results.

SessionEvent.description: A single event in the session history.

actorId.description: Unique actor identifier (1-255 chars). Can represent a user, agent, or any participant.

content.description: The message content as an array of typed content parts.

createdAt.description: Client-supplied timestamp for when the event happened (UTC).

systemTimestamp.description: Server-set timestamp for when the dataplane ingested the event (UTC).

metadata.description: Optional metadata as any valid JSON value.

SessionIdFilter.description: Filter by the long-term memory sessionId field. Matching is case-sensitive.

ne.description: Not equal to the given value.

items.description: Session identifier (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes). When the server generates one, it uses a 32-character UUID without dashes.

in.description: Matches any of the given values.

items.description: Session identifier (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes). When the server generates one, it uses a 32-character UUID without dashes.

all.description: Matches all of the given values.

SessionSummary.description:
Compacted summary of older session history for a session.

This is derived session state maintained by the background summarization workflow, not a conversation event. It is present only after at least one summarization cycle has completed.

text.description: The summary text, a single coherent block.

summarizedUpToEventId.description: Boundary event ID. This event and all events before it (by array position) are covered by the summary; `events` contains the retained turns after this boundary.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the summary was first created (UTC). Preserved across re-summarization cycles.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the summary was last regenerated (UTC). Updated on every summarization cycle. Equal to createdAt on the first cycle.

metadata.description: Metadata as a JSON object (e.g., model name, token count). Always present; defaults to an empty object when no metadata was supplied.

UpdateLongTermMemoryRequestContent.description: Partial update request for a long-term memory record.

namespace.description: Updated namespace. When provided, must be 1-64 chars alphanumeric and dashes; omit the field or send an empty string to clear.

ownerId.description: Updated owner ID. When provided, must be 1-64 chars alphanumeric and dashes and non-empty; omit the field to leave unchanged. Clearing is not supported because ownerId is required.

sessionId.description: Updated session ID. When provided, must be 1-64 chars alphanumeric and dashes; omit the field or send an empty string to clear.
Session ID associated with this memory.

ownerId.description: Owner ID associated with this memory.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the memory was created (UTC).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the memory was last updated (UTC).
